name: batched-neural-repair-verification-loop
description: One-GPU batched neural sweep plus heuristic repair and verification exploration loop targeting <3.60% bonus cells.

baseRef.description: Git ref used for scratch experiment worktrees.

calibrationSeconds.description: Initial one-GPU capacity calibration budget in seconds.

agentTimeoutSeconds.description: Per-explorer wall time cap in seconds.

outputRoot.description: Scratch root for worktrees, jobs, reports, calibration, and final artifacts.

steps.name: Create source worktree, shared venv, ensemble eval helper, and smoke test trainer
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
BASE_REF="{input.baseRef}"
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
mkdir -p "$ROOT" "$ROOT/state" "$ROOT/jobs" "$ROOT/worktrees" "$ROOT/reports" "$ROOT/source"
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
SOURCE_WORKTREE="$ROOT/source/konrad_manual_sweep"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if ! git rev-parse --verify "$BASE_REF^0" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "baseRef not found locally: $BASE_REF" >&2
  exit 2
fi
BASE_HEAD=$(git rev-parse "$BASE_REF^0")
git worktree remove --force "$SOURCE_WORKTREE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
rm -rf "$SOURCE_WORKTREE"
git worktree prune >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
git worktree add --detach "$SOURCE_WORKTREE" "$BASE_HEAD"
cd "$SOURCE_WORKTREE"
uv sync --frozen
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python after uv sync: $PY" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" preflight   --repo-root "$REPO_ROOT"   --root "$ROOT"   --source-worktree "$SOURCE_WORKTREE"   --base-ref "$BASE_REF"   --base-head "$BASE_HEAD"   --rounds "{input.rounds}"   --calibration-seconds "{input.calibrationSeconds}"   --agent-timeout-seconds "{input.agentTimeoutSeconds}"   --target-pct "{input.targetPct}"   --baseline-pct "{input.baselinePct}"

steps.name: Timed one-GPU ensemble capacity calibration
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" capacity --root "$ROOT" --calibration-seconds "{input.calibrationSeconds}"

steps.name: Create four initial search briefs from branch context and calibration results
steps.prompt:
Read the workflow design and calibration artifacts, then create the initial four-agent plan for a long batched neural + repair + verification campaign.

Read:
- {input.outputRoot}/design_brief.md
- {input.outputRoot}/state/inventory.json
- {input.outputRoot}/state/capacity_calibration.json
- {input.outputRoot}/state/capacity_calibration.md
- {input.outputRoot}/source/konrad_manual_sweep/README.md
- {input.outputRoot}/source/konrad_manual_sweep/scripts/train_batched_ensemble.py
- {input.outputRoot}/source/konrad_manual_sweep/scripts/verify_parallelogram_heuristic.py
- {input.outputRoot}/source/konrad_manual_sweep/scripts/verify_paralellogram_ip.py

Goal: find or prepare a route to a verified almost-5-coloring below {input.targetPct}% bonus cells. Create four distinct starting instructions: geometry/parallelogram; loss/optimizer/schedule; architecture/capacity; repair/verification/final fanout. Each instruction must be concrete, command-oriented, use the calibrated ensemble capacity, require the GPU flock lock for training, and require negative evidence.

Write a valid JSON object to {input.outputRoot}/state/seed_instructions.json and return the same JSON. Exact keys only: round_summary, best_findings, rejected_or_weak_findings, risks, agent_1, agent_2, agent_3, agent_4. Return JSON only.

steps.name: Validate seed JSON and install round-1 instructions
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" validate-seed --root "$ROOT"

steps.name: Run long four-agent batched neural/repair exploration loop
Create per-agent worktrees and prompts with shared GPU lock instructions
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" round-preflight --repo-root "$REPO_ROOT" --root "$ROOT" --iteration "{loop.iteration}" --target-pct "{input.targetPct}" --baseline-pct "{input.baselinePct}"

steps.name: Run four async explorer agents with serialized GPU lock for heavy commands

branches.name: Geometry/parallelogram explorer
branches.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
ROUND="{loop.iteration}"
AGENT="1"
AGENT_DIR="$ROOT/round_$ROUND/agent_$AGENT"
WORKTREE="$ROOT/worktrees/round_$ROUND/agent_$AGENT"
PROMPT_FILE="$AGENT_DIR/prompt.md"
REPORT_FILE="$AGENT_DIR/report.md"
RAW_STDOUT="$AGENT_DIR/pi_raw_tail.jsonl"
RAW_STDERR="$AGENT_DIR/pi_raw_stderr_tail.log"
RAW_STDERR_FULL="$AGENT_DIR/pi_raw_stderr.full.log"
RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES="$(printenv RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES || true)"
if [ -z "$RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES" ]; then
  RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES=2000000
fi
export AAC_WORKFLOW_ROOT="$ROOT"
export AAC_SOURCE_WORKTREE="$ROOT/source/konrad_manual_sweep"
export AAC_GPU_LOCK="$ROOT/gpu.lock"
export AAC_CALIBRATION_JSON="$ROOT/state/capacity_calibration.json"
export MPLCONFIGDIR="$ROOT/mplconfig"
mkdir -p "$AGENT_DIR" "$MPLCONFIGDIR"
if [ ! -x "$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python" ]; then
  echo "missing shared python: $AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python" >&2
  exit 2
fi
if [ ! -d "$WORKTREE/.git" ] && [ ! -f "$WORKTREE/.git" ]; then
  echo "missing worktree: $WORKTREE" >&2
  exit 2
fi
if [ ! -r "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then
  echo "missing prompt: $PROMPT_FILE" >&2
  exit 2
fi
printf 'shared_venv=%s python=%s gpu_lock=%s
' "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" "$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python" "$AAC_GPU_LOCK" > "$AGENT_DIR/env_status.log"
printf 'event=agent_start round=%s agent=%s worktree=%s prompt=%s
' "$ROUND" "$AGENT" "$WORKTREE" "$PROMPT_FILE" > "$AGENT_DIR/runner_status.log"
cd "$WORKTREE"
set +e
timeout --foreground --kill-after=30s "{input.agentTimeoutSeconds}s"   pi --mode json -p --no-session --no-extensions --thinking high --tools read,write,edit,bash "$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")"   2> "$RAW_STDERR_FULL" | tail -c "$RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES" > "$RAW_STDOUT"
code=$PIPESTATUS
tail_code=0
set -e
if [ -s "$RAW_STDERR_FULL" ]; then
  tail -c "$RAW_LOG_MAX_BYTES" "$RAW_STDERR_FULL" > "$RAW_STDERR"
else
  : > "$RAW_STDERR"
fi
rm -f "$RAW_STDERR_FULL"
raw_stdout_bytes=$(wc -c < "$RAW_STDOUT" 2>/dev/null || printf '0')
raw_stderr_bytes=$(wc -c < "$RAW_STDERR" 2>/dev/null || printf '0')
printf 'event=agent_end round=%s agent=%s exit_code=%s tail_exit_code=%s report=%s raw_stdout=%s raw_stdout_bytes=%s raw_stderr=%s raw_stderr_bytes=%s
' "$ROUND" "$AGENT" "$code" "$tail_code" "$REPORT_FILE" "$RAW_STDOUT" "$raw_stdout_bytes" "$RAW_STDERR" "$raw_stderr_bytes" >> "$AGENT_DIR/runner_status.log"
printf 'agent_status round=%s agent=%s exit_code=%s tail_exit_code=%s report=%s raw_stdout=%s raw_stdout_bytes=%s raw_stderr=%s raw_stderr_bytes=%s
' "$ROUND" "$AGENT" "$code" "$tail_code" "$REPORT_FILE" "$RAW_STDOUT" "$raw_stdout_bytes" "$RAW_STDERR" "$raw_stderr_bytes"
exit "$code"

steps.name: Collect reports and logs; failures are search evidence
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then

fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" collect-round --root "$ROOT" --iteration "{loop.iteration}"

steps.name: Reflect on four outputs and emit four next instructions
steps.prompt: You are the reflection agent for round {loop.iteration}/{loop.total}. Read design_brief.md, inventory.json, capacity_calibration.json, round_status.json, round_summary_input.md, previous_reflection.json, and prior_sibling_summaries.md under {input.outputRoot}. Objective: drive toward verified below-{input.targetPct}% almost-5-coloring. Prioritize actual summary.csv rows, repair outputs, exact commands, and negative evidence. Keep four lines alive: geometry, loss/schedule, architecture/capacity, repair/verification. Write valid JSON to {input.outputRoot}/round_{loop.iteration}/reflection.json and return it. Exact keys only: round_summary, best_findings, rejected_or_weak_findings, risks, runner_plan, agent_1, agent_2, agent_3, agent_4. Arrays for best_findings/rejected_or_weak_findings/risks. Return JSON only.

steps.name: Validate reflection and install next instructions
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" validate-reflection --root "$ROOT" --iteration "{loop.iteration}"

steps.name: Final campaign synthesis and final fanout plan
steps.prompt: Produce final synthesis for the campaign. Read design_brief.md, inventory.json, capacity_calibration.json, all round reflections and summaries under {input.outputRoot}, and relevant reports. Write {input.outputRoot}/final_synthesis.md with strongest candidates, commands, failed ideas, promoted artifacts, repair/verification status, and whether anything credibly approaches or beats {input.targetPct}%. Also write valid JSON to {input.outputRoot}/final_fanout_plan.json with keys: summary, recommended_array_jobs, candidate_families, promotion_gates, risks. recommended_array_jobs should describe concrete sbatch-array style experiment families for many seeds/parallelogram jitters, but do not claim they were submitted unless an artifact proves it.

steps.name: Validate final synthesis and fanout plan
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
ROOT_INPUT="{input.outputRoot}"
case "$ROOT_INPUT" in "/"*) ROOT="$ROOT_INPUT" ;; *) ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$ROOT_INPUT" ;; esac
AAC_SHARED_VENV="$(printenv AAC_SHARED_VENV || true)"
if [ -z "$AAC_SHARED_VENV" ]; then
  AAC_SHARED_VENV="$ROOT/shared_venv"
fi
export AAC_SHARED_VENV
export UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export VIRTUAL_ENV="$AAC_SHARED_VENV"
export PATH="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin:$PATH"
export UV_NO_SYNC=1
PY="$AAC_SHARED_VENV/bin/python"
HELPER="$REPO_ROOT/.pi/scripts/batched_neural_workflow.py"
if [ ! -x "$PY" ]; then
  echo "missing shared venv python: $PY" >&2
  echo "workflow preflight must run uv sync --frozen before later steps" >&2
  exit 2
fi
"$PY" "$HELPER" validate-final --root "$ROOT"
